objectives: Identify Threshold Network team responsible for payouts
tools: Information disclosure tools (e.g. Burp Suite, ZAP)

All focus areas have been mapped to target domains

Develop a list of test hypotheses
tools: Security frameworks and guidelines (e.g. OWASP, NIST)

success_criteria: All test hypotheses have been successfully tested
All successful exploits have been documented

objectives: Classify vulnerabilities according to Immunefi Vulnerability Severity Classification System V2.3

objectives: Create a detailed report of findings

risk_considerations.description: Exploitation of smart contract vulnerabilities could result in significant financial losses
risk_considerations.mitigation: Implement robust smart contract auditing and testing protocols

risk_considerations.description: Loss of user funds could result in significant reputational damage and financial losses
risk_considerations.mitigation: Implement robust user protection and risk management protocols
